title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-extra-security-groups (beta)
text:
Example:
service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-extra-security-groups: "sg-12abcd3456,sg-34dcba6543"
Used on: Service
The cloud controller manager integration with AWS elastic load balancing configures
a load balancer based on this annotation. The annotation value is a comma-separated
list of extra AWS VPC security groups to configure for the load balancer.
